use_cases: Visualizing hierarchical data structures with proportional area representation
Displaying categorical data distributions in a space-efficient manner
Enabling data exploration through interactive tile method switching
Supporting analytics dashboards with hierarchical metrics
Showing nested category relationships like file systems or organizational structures
ai_summary: A treemap chart component that renders hierarchical data as nested rectangles using the visx hierarchy library. Features multiple tile layout algorithms (squarify, binary, dice, slice) selectable via dropdown, with a blue-to-cream gradient color scale representing value magnitudes. Built on a dark background (#114b5f) for data visualization contrast, ideal for displaying proportional relationships in nested categorical datasets like Shakespeare's works.
